This IG is for FHIR version 5.0.0, while the package 'hl7.terminology#5.5.0' is for FHIR version 4.0.1
This IG is version 5.0.0, while the IG 'smart.who.int.pcmt' is from version 4.0.1
This IG is for FHIR version 5.0.0, while the package 'ihe.iti.mcsd#4.0.0' is for FHIR version 4.0.1

Illegal HTML: illegal html element: nark (insert content here</mark>.)
Illegal HTML: illegal html element: static_server_port ( e.g. http://localhost:8087)
The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Published code systems SHOULD conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
Published code systems SHOULD conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present
CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Published code systems SHOULD conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
Published code systems SHOULD conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present
A definition could not be found for Canonical URL 'http://smart.who.int/smart-base/ImplementationGuide-SGImplementationGuide'
value should not start or finish with whitespace 'WHO PreQualificaiton Presentation '
value should not start or finish with whitespace 'WHO PreQualificaiton VaccineType '

The ImplementationGuide is based on FHIR version 5.0.0 but package smart.who.int.base#0.1.0 is based on FHIR version 4.0.1. In general, this version mismatch should be avoided - some tools will try to make this work with variable degrees of success, but others will not even try

The ImplementationGuide uses package smart.who.int.base#0.1.0 released on 2024-09-20, but the most recent appropriate version is 0.2.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

The ImplementationGuide is based on FHIR version 5.0.0 but package smart.who.int.pcmt#0.1.0 is based on FHIR version 4.0.1. In general, this version mismatch should be avoided - some tools will try to make this work with variable degrees of success, but others will not even try

The ImplementationGuide is based on FHIR version 5.0.0 but package ihe.iti.mcsd#4.0.0 is based on FHIR version 4.0.1. In general, this version mismatch should be avoided - some tools will try to make this work with variable degrees of success, but others will not even try

Profile reference 'http://smart.who.int/smart-base/ImplementationGuide-SGImplementationGuide' has not been checked because it could not be found, and the validator is set to not fetch unknown profiles
